name: EU AI Act Agent
description: Checks whether a codebase or app complies with the EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689): detects AI usage, classifies the risk tier, maps provider/deployer obligations, and produces an article-cited gap report. Grounded in a bundled, dated reference pack. Read-only; not legal advice.
author: HybridAI

presentation.cardDescription: Reviews your codebase or app against the EU AI Act — finds where AI is used, classifies the risk tier, maps the obligations, and writes an article-cited gap report. Read-only, grounded in the current regulation, and clear that it is not legal advice.
